title: Held-out LIP-DATA-002 bridge evaluation

input_bundle.dataset_origin: LIP-DATA-002 curated 8-prompt held-out code task set

interpretation: This is the first held-out latent-space evaluation.
The bridge preserves target-space geometry and norm calibration better than early baselines, but pair-level generalization is not established.
retrieval_top1 is at chance, diagonal margin is negative, and most predictions are attracted to target 2.
The result supports continuing held-out evaluation before making any semantic or generalization claim.
known_limitations: The held-out evaluation contains only eight latent pairs.
The evaluation is latent-space only and does not evaluate text-level semantic fidelity.
retrieval_top1 is at random chance for eight candidates.
The result does not establish semantic transfer, text-level fidelity, model-to-model alignment, generalization, or production readiness.
data_policy: No generated eval outputs, checkpoints, shards, bundles, datasets, zips, caches, or run artifacts are committed.
scientific_claim_status: Held-out latent-space evaluation only. No semantic transfer, text-level fidelity, or production readiness claim.
